title: Projekt Farmer
description:
A realistic farming and adventure modpack featuring Cobblemon – inspired by Pokémon!
Farm crops, raise animals, and catch your own creatures in a vibrant world.
body:
A realistic farming and adventure modpack for NeoForge 1.21.1.
Grow crops, raise animals, manage your own butcher shop, and explore the world alongside Cobblemon creatures.
Build, trade, and live your best farm life in a vibrant Pokémon-inspired world!
